constants.name: AIN0
constants.code: AIN0   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 0);

constants.name: AIN1
constants.code: AIN1   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 1);

constants.name: AIN2
constants.code: AIN2   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 2);

constants.name: AIN3
constants.code: AIN3   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 3);

constants.name: AIN4
constants.code: AIN4   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 4);

constants.name: AIN5
constants.code: AIN5   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 5);

constants.name: AIN6
constants.code: AIN6   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 6);

constants.name: AIN7
constants.code: AIN7   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 7);

constants.name: GPIO0
constants.code: GPIO0  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange Then OrangePiZero2W.GPIO0 ELSE Device.Unavailable);

constants.name: GPIO1
constants.code: GPIO1  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange Then OrangePiZero2W.GPIO1 ELSE Device.Unavailable);

constants.name: GPIO10
constants.code: GPIO10 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO10 ELSE (0, 10));

constants.name: GPIO11
constants.code: GPIO11 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO11 ELSE (0, 11));

constants.name: GPIO12
constants.code: GPIO12 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO12 ELSE (0, 12));

constants.name: GPIO13
constants.code: GPIO13 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO13 ELSE (0, 13));

constants.name: GPIO14
constants.code: GPIO14 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO14 ELSE (0, 14));

constants.name: GPIO15
constants.code: GPIO15 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO15 ELSE (0, 15));

constants.name: GPIO16
constants.code: GPIO16 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO16 ELSE (0, 16));

constants.name: GPIO17
constants.code: GPIO17 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO17 ELSE (0, 17));

constants.name: GPIO18
constants.code: GPIO18 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO18 ELSE (0, 18));

constants.name: GPIO19
constants.code: GPIO19 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO19 ELSE (0, 19));

constants.name: GPIO2
constants.code: GPIO2  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO2  ELSE (0,  2));

constants.name: GPIO20
constants.code: GPIO20 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO20 ELSE (0, 20));

constants.name: GPIO21
constants.code: GPIO21 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO21 ELSE (0, 21));

constants.name: GPIO22
constants.code: GPIO22 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO22 ELSE (0, 22));

constants.name: GPIO23
constants.code: GPIO23 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO23 ELSE (0, 23));

constants.name: GPIO24
constants.code: GPIO24 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO24 ELSE (0, 24));

constants.name: GPIO25
constants.code: GPIO25 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO25 ELSE (0, 25));

constants.name: GPIO26
constants.code: GPIO26 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO26 ELSE (0, 26));

constants.name: GPIO27
constants.code: GPIO27 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO27 ELSE (0, 27));

constants.name: GPIO3
constants.code: GPIO3  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO3  ELSE (0,  3));

constants.name: GPIO4
constants.code: GPIO4  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO4  ELSE (0,  4));

constants.name: GPIO5
constants.code: GPIO5  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO5  ELSE (0,  5));

constants.name: GPIO6
constants.code: GPIO6  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO6  ELSE (0,  6));

constants.name: GPIO7
constants.code: GPIO7  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO7  ELSE (0,  7));

constants.name: GPIO8
constants.code: GPIO8  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO8  ELSE (0,  8));

constants.name: GPIO9
constants.code: GPIO9  : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.GPIO9  ELSE (0,  9));

constants.name: I2C1
constants.code: I2C1   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 1);

constants.name: I2C2
constants.code: I2C2   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.I2C2  ELSE Device.Unavailable);

constants.name: Orange
constants.code: Orange : CONSTANT Boolean := (CPUInfo.ModelName = OrangePiZero2W.ModelName);

constants.name: Pi5
constants.code: Pi5    : CONSTANT Boolean := (CPUInfo.Kind = CPUInfo.BCM2712);

constants.name: PWM0
constants.code: PWM0   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.PWM1 ELSIF Pi5 THEN RaspberryPi5.PWM0 ELSE (0, 0));

constants.name: PWM1
constants.code: PWM1   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.PWM2 ELSIF Pi5 THEN RaspberryPi5.PWM1 ELSE (0, 1));

constants.name: PWM2
constants.code: PWM2   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.PWM3 ELSIF Pi5 THEN RaspberryPi5.PWM2 ELSE (0, 0));

documentation.description: Orange Pi Zero 2W Pin 16, Raspberry Pi Pin 35 aka GPIO19

constants.name: PWM3
constants.code: PWM3   : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN OrangePiZero2W.PWM4 ELSIF Pi5 THEN RaspberryPi5.PWM3 ELSE (0, 1));

documentation.description: Orange Pi Zero 2W Pin 16, Raspberry Pi Pin 35 aka GPIO19

constants.name: SPI0_0
constants.code: SPI0_0 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 0);

constants.name: SPI0_1
constants.code: SPI0_1 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (0, 1);

constants.name: SPI1_0
constants.code: SPI1_0 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN Device.Unavailable ELSE (1, 0));

constants.name: SPI1_1
constants.code: SPI1_1 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN Device.Unavailable ELSE (1, 1));

constants.name: SPI1_2
constants.code: SPI1_2 : CONSTANT Device.Designator := (IF Orange THEN Device.Unavailable ELSE (1, 2));
